subject: [PATCH v5 29/36] mm: add NODE_PRIVATE_CAP_DEMOTION for private-node tiering demotion

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch adds a new capability, NODE_PRIVATE_CAP_DEMOTION, to allow private nodes to participate in the tiering demotion hierarchy. When set, memory-tiers will add the node to the demotion set and reclaim's demote path may target it. This requires CAP_RECLAIM to be enabled as well, which is enforced at registration. The patch also introduces a new function, node_allows_demotion(), to check if a private node allows demotion.
